gist.headline: Daily Garden Maintenance
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through the README, updating the latest news and recent apps sections to keep everything fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date information on recent developments and community projects.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) watering a small patch of flowers (representing the README) while the bee watches, symbolizing automated daily maintenance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a small patch of blooming pixel flowers while the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a small patch of blooming pixel flowers while the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
